age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) or BMLS or DMLT or DMLS (2 years duration)
qualification.details: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) or BMLS or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) or DMLS with course duration of at least 2 years recognised by State Government/Central Government. Two years experience of working in diagnostic laboratory for B.Sc/Diploma holders. One year experience for M.Sc holders. Preference for accredited labs experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Lab Technician position at District Hospital Mathura is 07-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Technician role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) or BMLS or a Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) or DMLS with a course duration of at least 2 years. Experience is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Lab Technician position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Lab Technician post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Lab Technician post at District Hospital Mathura as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Lab Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Lab Technician recruitment at District Hospital Mathura will involve an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is DHS/Contract/Appointment/2026-27/612-3.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Lab Technician position at District Hospital Mathura is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Hospital Mathura. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
